other_observers: Nick Moore , Brandon Percival , Lisa Edwards; Nick Moore was original finder
specific_location: 441 E.Bryant St , just south of Haxtun City Park
description: Obvious thrush species from shape and behaviour with orange brown nape and back , very heavily spotted black down to almost the vent over a white breast. Appeared to be smaller than an adjacent American Robin.See photo.Behaviors: Feeding on a grass lawn , taking a few hops , turning head to listen for insects and then quickly extracting a worm .Where there was leaf litter , it would turn over leaves looking for food.Call: No calls heardPlumage: Adult
